name: Atmospheric Conditions During Balloon Flight 20180818
description: This dataset contains atmospheric conditions such as temperature, humidity, wind direction, and speed, recorded during a balloon flight on August 18, 2018, between 11:09:00 and 11:39:00, over a geographic area with latitude ranging from 89.5537 to 89.5601 and longitude ranging from 36.54034 to 37.14087.
